feed.title: Accessibility Wars - ranger
feed.subtitle: Accessible Builds for the Guild Wars 2 Community

entry.title: Venom [qDPS]
entry.content:
Notes

This build is simplified to use a fixed, consistent and easy-to-remember rotation. Condition damage and eight-legged pets are empowered through the trait Arachnophobia. This build however still performs decently and allows one to comfortably learn the class mechanics with fewer APMs while providing very good and steady quickness uptime.

Gearing

ArmorStatUpgrade
Ritualist's Trapper
Ritualist's Trapper
Ritualist's Trapper
Ritualist's Trapper
Ritualist's Trapper
Ritualist's Trapper
TrinketsTypeStat
Back item Ritualist's
Amulet Ritualist's
Accessory Ritualist's
Accessory Ritualist's
TrinketsTypeStat
Ring Ritualist's
Ring Ritualist's
Relic Fractal
WeaponTypeStatUpgrade
Dagger Ritualist's Malice
Torch Ritualist's Doom
WeaponTypeStatUpgrade
Axe Ritualist's Malice
Dagger Ritualist's Geomancy

Consumables

  •  Salsa-Topped Veggie Flatbread
  •  Magnanimous Tuning Crystal

Build

[&DQQeHSE3SB95AHkAvwClAb0AAAC6ABsADxvtAAYkKwEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADBQAvAGYAAA==]
Juvenile Carrion Devourer
Juvenile Black Widow Spider

Rotation

General Rotation

The entirety of quickness Untamed rotation can be summarised into two steps.

  1. Opener (optional)
  2. Quickness Rotation
  3. DPS Rotation
  4. Repeat

Precast

  1. Sharpening Stone

Opener

The opener can give a very good burst, especially when the boss has different phases.

  1. Unleash Pet
  2. All your Utility Skills (7/8/9)
  3. 3 pet skills (can be cast simultaneously)
    • Venomous Outburst (Essential Unleashed Pet F1)
    • Rending Vines (Optional F2)
    • Enveloping Haze (Optional F3)
  4. Unleash Ranger
  • If you skip the opener, you just have to use Unleash Ranger to unlock Unleashed Ambush to proceed with the quickness rotation.
  • The 3 pet skills have no cast time but venomous outburst is your biggest contributor. The other 2 may be skipped to lower your APM if they slow your rotation. The damage difference is negligible.
  • If you use a 2KRO/3KRO keyboard, your simultaneous cast of pet skills may result in input failure. Most gaming keyboards are 6KRO, allowing all the buttons to be pressed at the same time. Alternatively, can just use F2.

Quickness Rotation

This build starts off with a very simple quickness rotation through the trait Unleashed Power.

  1. Unleashed Ambush
    • Neurotoxin Burst OR
    • Sundering Volley
  2. 🔃 Weapon Swap
  3. Unleashed Ambush (other weapon)
  4. Continue with DPS Rotation

DPS Rotation - L to R (A/D) R to L (D/T)

After using your 2nd Unleash Ambush -> use the skills from left to right for Axe/Dagger and from right to left for Dagger/Torch. The first skill you use will be recharged faster. This skill is bolded in the rotation and should be cast twice before Unleash Pet and reentering the opener. This will maximise the effect of Quick Draw. This is bolded in the rotation below.

  • Dagger/Torch 5432 then 5
    1. Skill 5
    2. Skill 4
    3. Skill 3
    4. Skill 2
    5. Skill 5
    6. Pet F2 (if available)
    7. Continue with Opener (see above)
  • Axe/Dagger 2345 then 2
    1. Skill 2
    2. Skill 3
    3. Skill 4
    4. Skill 5
    5. Skill 2
    6. Pet F2 (if available)
    7. Continue with Opener (see above)
  • Your pet skills don't interrupt your rotation and you may use them as desired.
  • Any condition based spider or devourer pet is preferred due to Arachnophobia
  • If you use Unleash Ranger before your 🔃 Weapon Swap refreshes, your Unleashed Ambush will not be ready.
  • Using Unleash Ranger too early will lead to a large DPS loss. Using it late will lead to a small DPS loss and maintain quickness.

Crowd Control Skills

  1. Tail Lash (F1)
  2. Exploding Spores (Utility Alternative)
  3. Spike Trap (Utility Alternative)
  4. Bring other pets if you need more

Benchmark

This bench was done with ascended food, standard utiltiies and without infusions.

entry.title: Whirling Bunny Thumper [qDPS]
entry.content:
Notes

This build is simplified to activate the  Relic of the Claw to reduce relic downtime on burst windows on a fixed, consistent and easy-to-remember rotation. This provides steady quickness for the group and decent sustained CC. There is a relatively a large amount of button downtime filled with auto attacks. This build however still performs decently and allows one to comfortably learn the class mechanics with fewer APMs while providing very good and steady quickness uptime.

There are two channeled skills that will destroy your build when cancelled. These skills are positioned in the rotation where they are less likely to be cancelled (because the other skills are on cooldown).

Gearing

ArmorStatUpgrade
Berserker's Fireworks
Berserker's Fireworks
Berserker's Fireworks
Berserker's Fireworks
Berserker's Fireworks
Berserker's Fireworks
TrinketsTypeStat
Back item Berserker's
Amulet Berserker's
Accessory Berserker's
Accessory Berserker's
TrinketsTypeStat
Ring Berserker's
Ring Berserker's
Relic Claw
WeaponTypeStatUpgrade
Hammer Berserker's Air
Hydromancy
WeaponTypeStatUpgrade
Sword Berserker's Air
Axe Berserker's Hydromancy

Consumables

  •  Cilantro Lime Sous-Vide Steak
  •  Superior Sharpening Stone

Build

[&DQQgHx45SBd5AHkAARsAAKUBAACsAQAADxsAAEAQARMAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADMwBaAAUAAA==]
Juvenile Black Moa
Juvenile Wallow

Rotation

Start in Unleash Pet using Sword/Axe

General Rotation

The entirety of quickness Untamed rotation can be summarised into two steps.

  1. Opener (optional)
  2. Quickness Rotation
  3. DPS Rotation

Opener

The opener can give a very good burst, especially when the boss has different phases.

  1. Unleash Pet
  2. "Sic 'Em!"
  3. 3 pet skills (can be cast simultaneously)
    • Venomous Outburst
    • Rending Vines
    • Enveloping Haze
  4. Unleash Ranger
  • If you skip the opener, you have to use Unleash Ranger to unlock Unleash Ambush to give quickness.
  • Starting the opener with sword will trigger  Relic of the Claw right at the beginning which is a significant initial DPS burst.
  • If you use a 2KRO/3KRO keyboard, your simultaneous cast of pet skills may result in input failure. Most gaming keyboards are 6KRO, allowing all the buttons to be pressed at the same time. Alternatively, you press the three pet skills one by one as fast as you can.

Quickness Rotation

This build starts off with a very simple quickness rotation through the trait Unleashed Power.

  1. Unleashed Ambush
    • Relentless Whirl OR
    • Deft Strike
  2. 🔃 Weapon Swap
  3. Unleashed Ambush (other weapon)
  4. Continue with DPS Rotation

DPS Rotation (2/3/4/5/7/8)

After using your 2nd Unleash Ambush -> Autos about to start/started

  1. Weapon 2
    • Unleashed Wild Swing OR Pounce
  2. Weapon 3
    • Unleashed Overbearing Smash OR Serpent's Strike
  3. Weapon 4
    • Unleashed Savage Shock Wave OR Path of Scars
  4. Weapon 5
    • Unleashed Thump OR Whirling Defense
  5. Utilities 7/8 if available +/- Pet skill (F3)
    • Exploding Spores OR "Sic 'Em!"
    • Undead Plague
  6. Optional Weapon 2 on refresh
  7. Autos (till 🔃 Weapon Swap refreshes)
  8. Unleash Pet -> Unleash Ranger
  9. Continue with Quickness Rotation
  • Use "Sic 'Em!" on cooldown or during a comfortable window when you are not pressing any skills.
  • Your pet skills don't interrupt your rotation and you may use them as desired. Any power based pet is viable.
  • Try not to cancel Relentless Whirl or Whirling Defense.
  • You may wish to introduce a slight delay after casting Relentless Whirl
  • The sequence of button presses are similar on both weapons.
  • If you are slow on your rotation, you can skip Weapon 3.
  • If you use Unleash Ranger before your 🔃 Weapon Swap refreshes, your Unleashed Ambush will not be ready.
  • Dragging your feet on using ambush will lead to a small 1-2k DPS loss. Swapping Unleash Mode too early will lead to a higher DPS loss.

Relic of the Claw Uptime

< Relic of the Claw is triggered by your CC skills. These are littered between your important skill casts except during the end of the hammer phase. If you have followed the DPS rotation above Exploding Spores should be available towards the later part of your hammer DPS rotation.

If you started off with the wrong weapon, then remember to reserve Exploding Spores for hammer.

Crowd Control Skills

  1. Deft Strike before Relentless Whirl
  2. Path of Scars before Whirling Defense
  3. Exploding Spores during hammer rotation
  4. Your pet F3 skills deal CC through the trait Beastly Warden

Benchmark

This bench was done with ascended food, standard utiltiies and without infusions.

entry.title: Vicious Afflictions [DPS]
entry.content:
The purpose of writing this guide is to provide a no-weapon swap method to play a melee PVE soulbeast while easily hitting the 70% benchmark with minimal effort. This build is low cognition, has few repetitions but has a relatively moderate APM. Only two CC skills need to be spaced out, while the rest of the skills are used on cooldown. Because this build scales to both condi and power, Vicious Quarry, a power trait is taken.

The juvenile bee is essential for this build and cannot be swapped out.

Gearing and Consumables

Equipment

WeaponTypeStatUpgrade
Dagger Viper's Malice
Dagger Viper's Earth
ArmorStatUpgrade
Viper's Afflicted
Viper's Afflicted
Viper's Afflicted
Viper's Afflicted
Viper's Afflicted
Viper's Afflicted
TrinketsTypeStat
Back item Viper's
Amulet Viper's
Accessory Sinister
Accessory Sinister
TrinketsTypeStat
Ring Sinister
Ring Sinister
Relic Aristocracy
  • Relic of Aristocracy can be procced through auto-attacks, therefore your mainhand must be dagger most of the time.
  • Swapping all your Viper's (HoT-only Set) pieces to Celestial (Core Set)) will lead to a small DPS loss (<10%).
  • Grieving pieces may be added in place of Sinister Pieces

Weapon Swap

Weapon swap is optional but not recommended unless situationally used

  1. Shortbow (Ranged/CC)

Infusions

  •  Malign Infusion OR
  •  Mighty +5 Agony Infusion

GW2Skills Link

Food

  •  Salsa-Topped Veggie Flatbread
  •  Cilantro and Cured Meat Flatbread
  •  Spherified Cilantro Oyster Soup
  •  Koi Cake(budget alternative)
  • The difference between the various ascended food is minimal.

Utility

  •  Toxic Tuning Crystal

Pets

  1. The Janthiri Bee is competitive in damage and provides ready access CC, making it the default best option for raiding.

Build

Condi DPS\

[&DQQePSE3Ny55AAAAvwAAAOkWAAAbAAAALhYAAEclAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAACLwBrAAA=]
Juvenile Warthog
Juvenile Janthiri Bee

Rotation and Utilities

DPS Rotation

Stay merged at all times.

  1. Pre-battle - Spike Trap + Sharpening Stone (up to 30s before fight starts)
  2. General Rotation - Use all skills on cooldown except healing and CC skills.
  3. Spread out Bumble, Spike Trap to maintain Twice as Vicious
    • Use Spike Trap on cooldown.
    • Delay Bumble.

Crowd Control

  1. Bumble and Spike Trap are part of your rotation.
  2. You may switch to a shortbow temporarily if you require CC.

Sustainability

  1. Swapping all your Vipers pieces to Celestial only reduces your DPS by 5%. This is an efficient way to maintain high DPS and survive harder encounters in open world.
  2. You may opt to use Oyster-based ascended food or birthday cake.

Benchmark

  • The build is benched with ascended but without infusions. You should be able to achieve 32.5k DPS with infusions at the golem.
  • For benching or if playing solo, pick Oppressive Superiority.
  • It is not possible to bench with allies unless you have a friend to assist you.

entry.title: Barbed Arrows [cDPS]
entry.content:
The purpose of writing this guide is to provide a no-weapon swap method to play a ranged PVE soulbeast while easily hitting the 70% benchmark with minimal effort. This build is low cognition, has few repetitions but has a relatively moderate APM. The skills do not require specific timing and having extra hard CC in the build allows flexible upkeep of Twice as Vicious, which has a rather tight timing on other builds. This is inspired by the Guild Wars 1 skill Barbed Arrows.

The juvenile bee does decent condition damage with a very decent extra 300 points of CC.

Gearing and Consumables

Equipment

WeaponTypeStatUpgrade
Shortbow Viper's Malice
Earth
ArmorStatUpgrade
Viper's Trapper
Viper's Trapper
Viper's Trapper
Viper's Trapper
Viper's Trapper
Viper's Trapper
TrinketsTypeStat
Back item Viper's
Amulet Viper's
Accessory Viper's
Accessory Viper's
TrinketsTypeStat
Ring Viper's
Ring Viper's
Relic Fractal

Weapon Swap

Weapon swap is optional

  1. Dagger/Dagger
  2. Dagger/Torch

Infusions

  •  Malign Infusion OR
  •  Mighty +5 Agony Infusion

Optimised Viper's Loadout GW2Skills Link

Relic

  •  Relic of the Fractal (standard)
  •  Relic of Thorns (situational)
  • It is not possible to bench  Relic of Thorns due to the conditions required to trigger it at the golem.
  •  Relic of the Blightbringer has been considered but remains a much weaker version as there is a hidden ICD, preventing Poison Volley from proccing multiple times.

Food

  •  Cilantro and Cured Meat Flatbread
  •  Koi Cake(budget alternative)
  • The difference between using this and standard condition food is minimal.

Utility

  •  Toxic Tuning Crystal

Pets

  1. The Janthiri Bee is competitive in damage and provides ready access CC, making it the default best option for raiding.
  2. The Wallow provides a poison field, decent healing and condition cleanses which is good in open world.
  3. Other options include the Bristleback, Jungle Spider, Jaguar, Warthog and Black Widow.

Build

Condi DPS\

[&DQQeLSE3Ny55AAAAvwAAAOkWAAC6AAAALhYAAEclAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADawAvAAUAAA==]
Juvenile Warthog
Juvenile Janthiri Bee

Rotation and Utilities

DPS Rotation

Stay merged at all times.

  1. Early Precast - Spike Trap and stack dodges.
  2. Pre-battle - One Wolf Pack + Sharpening Stone + Vulture Stance + Sharpen Spines (if using Bristleback)
  3. General Rotation - Use all non-healing skills on cooldown except F1

Crowd Control

  1. You have decent CC by just using Concussion Shot (Shortbow 4)
  2. You have many other CC skills littered in your weapon/pet/utility kit including the ones used to upkeep Twice as Vicious (see below).
  3. You can precast Sharpening Stone for additional CC just before the CC phase of an encounter.

Sustainability

  1. You may opt to take Healing Spring for better condi cleanse
  2. Quick Shot (Shortbow 3) is an evade that does a step back. This is useful for bosses with pull mechanics.
  3. If you need an extra heal, you may swap your pet to the Wallow for Spiritual Reprieve

Optimisation

Twice as Vicious

  1. Spread out Sharpening Stone, Primal Cry and Concussion Shot to maximise Twice as Vicious uptime.
  2. Use your other pet CC skills if your coverage is falling such as Bumble.

Dodging

  1. Where dodging is necessary, you may delay Quick Shot after the dodge to have better uptime of Light on your Feet.
  2. Bumble can also refresh Light on your Feet.

Benchmark

The build is benched with ascended gear and infusions, skipping Quick Shot (Shortbow 3) to avoid forced movement.

entry.title: Beastblade [pDPS]
entry.content:
A power-based soulbeast build. This build relies on a single combo, but otherwise boils down to just hitting buttons when they're off cooldown.

Gearing

ArmorStatUpgrade
Berserker's Scholar
Berserker's Scholar
Berserker's Scholar
Berserker's Scholar
Berserker's Scholar
Berserker's Scholar
WeaponTypeStatUpgrade
Sword Berserker's Force
Axe Berserker's Impact
TrinketsTypeStat
Back item Berserker's
Amulet Berserker's
Accessory Berserker's
Accessory Berserker's
TrinketsTypeStat
Ring Berserker's
Ring Berserker's
Relic Thief
  • Consumables:
    • Cilantro Lime Sous-Vide Steak (Power/Ferocity)
    • Superior Sharpening Stone (Power)

Build

[&DQQeOSA6NzqhAAAApQEAALUAAACsAQAALhYAACcAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADMwBaAAUABGf3AADd9gAAm/YAAOj2AAA=]
Juvenile Pig

Notes

You have ONE combo to perform in this build, the rest of your skills are pressed off cooldown.

Here's the combo, which you should perform whenever Frost Trap is off cooldown:

  1. Frost Trap
  2. "Sic 'Em!"
  3. One Wolf Pack
  4. Whirling Defense

It is very easy to cancel Whirling Defense and you should take utmost care not to cancel it.

The rest of your skills that you should press off cooldown, preferably in the order stated below, but really in no particular order, are:

  1. Maul
  2. Path of Scars
  3. Pounce
  4. Worldly Impact

Auto attack to fill any gaps.

Technically using Serpent's Strike is a DPS increase, but it has a long aftercast and cancelling aftercast is hard so we shall not press it.

The stated DPS of this build is 34.7k, but in reality this build performs MUCH better in raids. It has the highest burst damage in the game, and with many fights having multiple phases, in which your skills can cooldown between burst windows, Power Soulbeast will really start to shine.

Crowd Control

Your CC skills are, in order of how you should use them:

  1. Brutal Charge
  2. Serpent's Strike
  3. Signet of the Wild

Video

Changes

content/builds/power-soulbeast.md was changed:

  • Go for the Throat: Increased the damage bonus of Lesser "Sic 'Em!" while in Beastmode from 10% to 15% in PvE only. Reduced the cooldown of Lesser "Sic 'Em!" from 15 seconds to 10 seconds in PvE only. Increased the duration from 5 seconds to 8 seconds when triggered by a pet.
  • Go for the Throat: Increased the damage bonus of Lesser "Sic 'Em!" while a soulbeast is merged from 10% to 15% in PvE only.
